final:
module RefModule(
    input clk,
    input parallel_load,
    input serial_in,
    output serial_out,
    input [3:0] data_in
);reg [3:0] register;

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (parallel_load) begin
            register <= data_in;
        end else begin
            register <= {register[2:0], serial_in};
        end
    end

    assign serial_out = register[0];

endmodule
